title: Tyk gateway OSS config file schema
description: Schema that describes the config file of OSS tyk gateway.

listen_port.title: The listen_port schema
listen_port.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

log_level.title: The log_level schema
log_level.description: Configuration field to control the gateway logging level.

secret.title: The secret schema
secret.description: Configuration field as API key for the Tyk Gateway API. It should be passed along as the `X-Tyk-Authorization header in any requests made.

template_path.title: The template_path schema
template_path.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

tyk_js_path.title: The tyk_js_path schema
tyk_js_path.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

middleware_path.title: The middleware_path schema
middleware_path.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

use_db_app_configs.title: Loading API configurations from DB
use_db_app_configs.description: For licensed users this needs to be true. False means it's not using a DB to load the configurations.

app_path.title: The app_path schema
app_path.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

storage.title: The storage schema
storage.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

type.title: The type schema
type.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

host.title: The host schema
host.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

port.title: The port schema
port.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

username.title: The username schema
username.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

password.title: The password schema
password.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

database.title: The Redis database to be selected after connecting to the server

optimisation_max_idle.title: The optimisation_max_idle schema
optimisation_max_idle.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

optimisation_max_active.title: The optimisation_max_active schema
optimisation_max_active.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

enable_analytics.title: The enable_analytics schema
enable_analytics.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

analytics_config.title: Configurations for analytics
analytics_config.description: `analytics_config` contains setting for analytics captured by the gateway

type.title: Used for analytis by hybrid gateway
type.description: For OSS gateway use an empty string.

purge_interval.title: The interval length for purging analytics
purge_interval.description: Set the interval length on how often the tyk Gateway will purge analytics data. This value is in seconds and defaults to 10 seconds.

ignored_ips.title: The ignored_ips schema
ignored_ips.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

enable_detailed_recording.title: Recording full request and response content
enable_detailed_recording.description: Set this value to `true` to have Tyk store the inbound request and outbound response data in HTTP Wire format as part of the Analytics data. Please note, this will greatly increase your analytics DB size and can cause performance degradation on analytics processing by the Dashboard. This setting can be overridden with an organisation flag, enabed at an API level, or on individual Key level.

health_check.title: The health_check schema - deprecated!!!
health_check.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

enable_health_checks.title: The enable_health_checks schema
enable_health_checks.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

optimisations_use_async_session_write.title: The optimisations_use_async_session_write schema
optimisations_use_async_session_write.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

enable_non_transactional_rate_limiter.title: The enable_non_transactional_rate_limiter schema
enable_non_transactional_rate_limiter.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

enable_sentinel_rate_limiter.title: The enable_sentinel_rate_limiter schema
enable_sentinel_rate_limiter.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

enable_redis_rolling_limiter.title: The enable_redis_rolling_limiter schema
enable_redis_rolling_limiter.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

allow_master_keys.title: The allow_master_keys schema
allow_master_keys.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

policies.title: The policies schema
policies.description: Tell the gateway where to pick the policies from.

policy_source.title: Set the policies source
policy_source.description: Set to `file` to load policies file from the file system. Set to `service` to use the Dashboard service.

policy_record_name.title: Specifies the path of your JSON file containing the available policies
policy_record_name.description: This option is required if `policies.policy_source` is set to `file`.

policy_path.title: Specifies the path of the directory  containing the available policies
policy_path.description: This option is required if `policies.policy_source` is set to `file`.

hash_keys.title: Set the format of the auth token keys in Redis
hash_keys.description: True value will use the hashed value of the key as the key in Redis.

close_connections.title: The close_connections schema
close_connections.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.

http_server_options.description: An explanation about the purpose of this instance.
